1	# 宠迹·PawLog 视觉设计系统（DESIGN.md）
2	
3	## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere
4	
5	宠迹·PawLog 的视觉语言是**圆润、柔软、治愈**的。我们不想做一个冷冰冰的医疗健康工具，而是让每一次打开 App 都像走进一间被阳光晒暖的宠物房：薄荷绿的清新空气、肉垫粉的温柔触感、大圆角卡片像云朵一样托起信息。
6	
7	整体氛围的关键词：
8	- **清新（Fresh）**：薄荷绿作为主色，带来洁净、健康、自然的感觉。
9	- **温柔（Tender）**：肉垫粉作为辅助色，出现在头像光环、按钮高亮、空状态插画中。
10	- **可靠（Trustworthy）**：信息层级清晰，记录入口大而明确，减少主人的操作焦虑。
11	- **治愈（Healing）**：圆角、柔和阴影、微渐变、毛玻璃效果，让界面像宠物一样软萌。
12	
13	与参考模板 TEMPLATE_DESIGN.md 的 Apple 风格不同，PawLog 不追求极简冷峻，而是在组件内部使用**多色和谐搭配**、**柔和渐变**与**细腻阴影**，营造出温暖亲切的治愈感。
14	
15	## 2. Color Palette & Roles
16	
17	### Primary（主色）
18	- **薄荷绿 500** `#5ED7B6`：品牌主色，用于主按钮、关键图标、选中态、图表主折线。
19	- **薄荷绿 600** `#3CB89A`：主色深一度，用于 hover/pressed 状态。
20	- **薄荷绿 100** `#E8FBF5`：极淡薄荷背景，用于卡片底色、选中 chip、气泡背景。
21	- **薄荷绿 50** `#F3FDF9`：页面级浅底、空状态背景。
22	
23	### Secondary（辅助色）
24	- **肉垫粉 500** `#FFB3C1`：品牌辅助色，用于宠物头像光环、强调标签、空状态插画、情感化高亮。
25	- **肉垫粉 600** `#FF8FA3`：粉色深一度，用于选中态、 urgent 提醒背景。
26	- **肉垫粉 100** `#FFF0F3`：淡粉背景，用于提醒卡片、家庭共享入口背景。
27	
28	### Accent & Functional
29	- **阳光黄 500** `#FFD166`：用于完成标记、星星、正向趋势标签。
30	- **阳光黄 100** `#FFF7E0`：完成态卡片背景。
31	- **薰衣草紫 500** `#B8B8E0`：用于病历、医疗相关图标与卡片描边。
32	- **薰衣草紫 100** `#F0F0FA`：病历卡片背景。
33	- **天空蓝 500** `#A0D8EF`：用于体重趋势、信息提示。
34	- **天空蓝 100** `#E8F6FC`：体重统计卡片背景。
35	
36	### Neutrals（中性色）
37	- **深森绿 900** `#1A3C34`：主文本色，替代纯黑，更柔和。
38	- **深森绿 700** `#3D5A52`：二级文本。
39	- **深森绿 500** `#6B857E`：三级文本、占位符、禁用态。
40	- **深森绿 200** `#C5D3CF`：边框、分割线。
41	- **深森绿 100** `#E5EDEA`：卡片描边、浅色分割线。
42	- **米白 50** `#FAFDFC`：页面主背景。
43	- **纯白** `#FFFFFF`：卡片背景、输入框背景。
44	
45	### Semantic Colors（语义色）
46	- **成功绿** `#4CAF79`
47	- **警告橙** `#FF9F5A`
48	- **错误红** `#FF6B6B`
49	- **信息蓝** `#5BBCE4`
50	
51	## 3. Typography Rules
52	
53	### Font Family
54	- **Display / Heading**：`HarmonyOS Sans SC`, `PingFang SC`, `Microsoft YaHei`, sans-serif
55	- **Body**：`HarmonyOS Sans SC`, `PingFang SC`, `Microsoft YaHei`, sans-serif
56	
57	中文环境下不使用西文光学字号规则，采用更舒展的中文行高。
58	
59	### Hierarchy
60	
61	| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Color |
62	|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
63	| Display Hero | 32px | 700 | 1.25 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
64	| Section Heading | 22px | 700 | 1.3 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
65	| Card Title | 18px | 700 | 1.35 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
66	| Sub-heading | 16px | 600 | 1.4 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
67	| Body | 15px | 400 | 1.55 | 0.02em | 深森绿 700 |
68	| Body Emphasis | 15px | 600 | 1.5 | 0.01em | 深森绿 900 |
69	| Caption | 13px | 400 | 1.45 | 0.02em | 深森绿 500 |
70	| Caption Bold | 13px | 600 | 1.4 | 0 | 深森绿 700 |
71	| Micro | 11px | 500 | 1.35 | 0.02em | 深森绿 500 |
72	| Button Large | 17px | 600 | 1 | 0.01em | 纯白 |
73	| Button | 15px | 600 | 1 | 0.01em | 纯白 |
74	
75	### Principles
76	- 标题使用较大字重（700）增强信赖感。
77	- 正文行高 1.55，中文阅读更舒适。
78	- 标签/时间戳使用 Caption 或 Micro，保持界面清爽。
79	
80	## 4. Component Stylings
81	
82	### Buttons
83	
84	**Primary CTA（薄荷绿实心）**
85	- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #5ED7B6 0%, #3CB89A 100%)`
86	- Text: `#FFFFFF`
87	- Padding: 14px 24px
88	- Border Radius: 28px（大圆角药丸）
89	- Font: 16px, weight 600
90	- Shadow: `0 6px 16px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.32)`
91	- Active: scale 0.98，背景加深
92	
93	**Secondary Button（白底描边）**
94	- Background: `#FFFFFF`
95	- Border: 1.5px solid `#E5EDEA`
96	- Text: 深森绿 900
97	- Padding: 12px 20px
98	- Border Radius: 24px
99	- Active: 背景变为薄荷绿 50
100	
101	**Soft Button（浅薄荷底）**
102	- Background: `#E8FBF5`
103	- Text: 薄荷绿 600
104	- Padding: 10px 16px
105	- Border Radius: 20px
106	- Active: 背景变为薄荷绿 100
107	
108	**Filter Chip**
109	- Default: bg `#FFFFFF`, border 1px `#E5EDEA`, text 深森绿 700
110	- Selected: bg 薄荷绿 100, text 薄荷绿 600, border 薄荷绿 500
111	- Border Radius: 20px
112	- Padding: 8px 16px
113	
114	### Cards & Containers
115	
116	**Standard Card**
117	- Background: `#FFFFFF`
118	- Border Radius: 24px
119	- Padding: 20px
120	- Shadow: `0 4px 20px rgba(26, 60, 52, 0.06)`
121	- Border: 1px solid `rgba(197, 211, 207, 0.4)`（极淡描边）
122	
123	**Hero Card（首页顶部汇总）**
124	- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #E8FBF5 0%, #FFFFFF 100%)`
125	- Border Radius: 28px
126	- Padding: 24px
127	- Shadow: `0 8px 28px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.18)`
128	
129	**Reminder Card**
130	- Urgent: bg 肉垫粉 100, border 肉垫粉 500, shadow 带粉色光晕
131	- Normal: bg `#FFFFFF`, border 深森绿 100
132	- Done: bg 阳光黄 100, opacity 0.85
133	- Border Radius: 20px
134	
135	**Medical Card**
136	- Background: 薰衣草紫 100
137	- Border: 1px solid 薰衣草紫 500 / 30%
138	- Border Radius: 20px
139	
140	### Inputs
141	
142	**Text Field**
143	- Background: `#FAFDFC`
144	- Border: 1px solid `#E5EDEA`
145	- Border Radius: 16px
146	- Padding: 14px 16px
147	- Focus: border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 0 0 3px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.15)`
148	- Placeholder: 深森绿 500
149	
150	**Selector / Picker**
151	- Background: `#FFFFFF`
152	- Border: 1px solid `#E5EDEA`
153	- Border Radius: 16px
154	- Padding: 14px 16px
155	- Right icon: chevron-down
156	
157	### Navigation
158	
159	**Bottom Tab Bar**
160	- Background: `#FFFFFF`
161	- Height: 68px + safe area
162	- Border Top: 1px solid `#E5EDEA`
163	- Active icon/text: 薄荷绿 500
164	- Inactive icon/text: 深森绿 500
165	- Icon size: 24px
166	- Label: 11px, weight 500
167	- Top padding: 8px
168	
169	**Top Header**
170	- Transparent or 米白 50
171	- Title: Section Heading, left aligned
172	- Right action: 肉垫粉 500 圆形按钮（+ / 设置）
173	
174	## 5. Layout Principles
175	
176	### Spacing System
177	- Base unit: 4px
178	- Scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 40, 48, 64
179	- 卡片之间默认 16px
180	- 页面水平内边距：16px
181	
182	### Grid & Container
183	- 移动端内容区最大宽度：390px，居中
184	- 页面内所有卡片/列表在 16px 水平内边距内
185	- 首页顶部宠物头像横向滚动，超出屏幕可滑动
186	- 底部 Tab Bar 固定，宽度与内容区一致，不超过 390px
187	
188	### Whitespace Philosophy
189	- 顶部留出 44-56px 状态栏/标题区
190	- 首屏核心内容（header + 汇总卡片 + 快捷入口）控制在 600vp 内
191	- 卡片内部信息密度适中，留出呼吸感
192	- 空状态使用大幅插画 + 引导按钮，避免信息压迫
193	
194	## 6. Depth & Elevation
195	
196	| Level | Treatment | Use |
197	|-------|-----------|-----|
198	| Flat | 无阴影，仅背景色 | 页面底层、分隔区块 |
199	| Card | `0 4px 20px rgba(26,60,52,0.06)` | 标准卡片 |
200	| Elevated Card | `0 8px 28px rgba(94,215,182,0.18)` | 首页汇总、重要 CTA 卡片 |
201	| Floating Button | `0 8px 24px rgba(94,215,182,0.35)` | 悬浮添加按钮 |
202	| Sheet | 顶部圆角 28px，背景 `#FFFFFF`，上方 overlay `rgba(26,60,52,0.35)` | 底部弹层 |
203	| Focus | `0 0 0 3px rgba(94,215,182,0.2)` | 输入框聚焦 |
204	
205	## 7. Do's and Don'ts
206	
207	### Do
208	- 使用大圆角（20px-28px）营造柔软感。
209	- 在卡片、按钮、关键区域使用薄荷绿到深薄荷的渐变。
210	- 使用肉垫粉作为头像光环、情感化点缀、urgent 提醒背景。
211	- 为每个图标级 SVG 提供语义化的 `<title>`。
212	- 保持底部 Tab 固定，不侧滑、不满铺。
213	- 为空状态设计独立插画与明确引导。
214	
215	### Don't
216	- 不要使用尖锐直角（小于 12px）。
217	- 不要让同一屏幕出现 4 种以上高饱和强调色。
218	- 不要使用 emoji 作为 UI 图标。
219	- 不要把 Tab 导航放到侧边或顶部。
220	- 不要在首页一次性展示过多数字图表。
221	
222	## 8. Responsive Behavior
223	
224	### Target Device
225	- 宽度：1272vp × 2756vp
226	- 内容区 max-width：390-420vp，居中
227	- 底部 Tab Bar 宽度跟随 body，不超过 390px，左右 auto margin
228	- 在 PC 浏览器上禁止全宽拉伸
229	
230	### Touch Targets
231	- 主按钮高度 ≥ 48px
232	- 图标按钮触摸区域 ≥ 44px
233	- Tab item 高度 68px
234	- 快捷记录入口 ≥ 72px × 72px
235	
236	## 9. Semantic UI Binding
237	
238	### Surfaces & Routes
239	
240	| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID |
241	|------------|---------|-------|--------|
242	| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home |
243	| records | records-page | pages/Records | tab-records |
244	| trends | trends-page | pages/Trends | tab-trends |
245	| care | care-page | pages/Care | tab-care |
246	| profile | profile-page | pages/Profile | tab-profile |
247	| pet-picker | pet-picker-sheet | (sheet) | - |
248	| add-record | add-record-sheet | (sheet) | - |
249	| record-diet | record-diet-sheet | (sheet) | - |
250	| record-stool | record-stool-sheet | (sheet) | - |
251	| record-weight | record-weight-sheet | (sheet) | - |
252	| record-meds | record-meds-sheet | (sheet) | - |
253	| reminder-detail | reminder-detail-page | pages/ReminderDetail | - |
254	| medical-case | medical-case-page | pages/MedicalCase | - |
255	| medical-case-editor | medical-case-editor-page | pages/MedicalCaseEditor | - |
256	| family-invite | family-invite-sheet | (sheet) | - |
257	| pet-editor | pet-editor-page | pages/PetEditor | - |
258	
259	### Key Semantic Targets to Preserve
260	
261	- `home-pet-switcher`, `home-current-pet-avatar`, `home-current-pet-name`
262	- `home-quick-diet`, `home-quick-stool`, `home-quick-weight`, `home-quick-meds`
263	- `home-today-summary-list`, `home-reminder-list`, `home-empty-state`
264	- `records-filter-*`, `records-list`, `records-add-button`
265	- `trends-tab-*`, `trends-period-*`, `trends-chart`, `trends-stats-list`
266	- `care-tab-reminders`, `care-tab-medical`, `care-reminder-list`, `care-medical-list`
267	- `profile-manage-pets`, `profile-family`, `profile-settings`, `profile-about`
268	- Sheet 内的保存/关闭按钮：`record-*-save`, `record-*-close`, `add-record-*`, `pet-picker-*`
269	- 详情页：`reminder-detail-mark-done`, `reminder-detail-edit`, `reminder-detail-delete`
270	- 编辑器：`medical-editor-*`, `pet-editor-*`
271	
272	### Event Names to Preserve
273	
274	- `open-pet-picker`, `open-pet-editor`, `open-add-record`
275	- `open-record-diet`, `open-record-stool`, `open-record-weight`, `open-record-meds`
276	- `save-record-*`, `filter-records-*`, `switch-trends-*`, `set-period-*`
277	- `switch-care-reminders`, `switch-care-medical`, `open-reminder-editor`, `mark-reminder-done`, `delete-reminder`
278	- `open-medical-editor`, `save-medical-case`, `pick-medical-image`
279	- `open-family-invite`, `copy-invite-code`, `close-sheet`, `navigate-back`, `save-pet`
280	
281	### Change Requests
282	
283	- 无。当前语义协议已覆盖全部功能页面与关键交互目标。

# 宠迹·PawLog 视觉设计系统（DESIGN.md）

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

宠迹·PawLog 的视觉语言是**圆润、柔软、治愈**的。我们不想做一个冷冰冰的医疗健康工具，而是让每一次打开 App 都像走进一间被阳光晒暖的宠物房：薄荷绿的清新空气、肉垫粉的温柔触感、大圆角卡片像云朵一样托起信息。

整体氛围的关键词：
- **清新（Fresh）**：薄荷绿作为主色，带来洁净、健康、自然的感觉。
- **温柔（Tender）**：肉垫粉作为辅助色，出现在头像光环、按钮高亮、空状态插画中。
- **可靠（Trustworthy）**：信息层级清晰，记录入口大而明确，减少主人的操作焦虑。
- **治愈（Healing）**：圆角、柔和阴影、微渐变、毛玻璃效果，让界面像宠物一样软萌。

与参考模板 TEMPLATE_DESIGN.md 的 Apple 风格不同，PawLog 不追求极简冷峻，而是在组件内部使用**多色和谐搭配**、**柔和渐变**与**细腻阴影**，营造出温暖亲切的治愈感。

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Primary（主色）
- **薄荷绿 500** `#5ED7B6`：品牌主色，用于主按钮、关键图标、选中态、图表主折线。
- **薄荷绿 600** `#3CB89A`：主色深一度，用于 hover/pressed 状态。
- **薄荷绿 100** `#E8FBF5`：极淡薄荷背景，用于卡片底色、选中 chip、气泡背景。
- **薄荷绿 50** `#F3FDF9`：页面级浅底、空状态背景。

### Secondary（辅助色）
- **肉垫粉 500** `#FFB3C1`：品牌辅助色，用于宠物头像光环、强调标签、空状态插画、情感化高亮。
- **肉垫粉 600** `#FF8FA3`：粉色深一度，用于选中态、 urgent 提醒背景。
- **肉垫粉 100** `#FFF0F3`：淡粉背景，用于提醒卡片、家庭共享入口背景。

### Accent & Functional
- **阳光黄 500** `#FFD166`：用于完成标记、星星、正向趋势标签。
- **阳光黄 100** `#FFF7E0`：完成态卡片背景。
- **薰衣草紫 500** `#B8B8E0`：用于病历、医疗相关图标与卡片描边。
- **薰衣草紫 100** `#F0F0FA`：病历卡片背景。
- **天空蓝 500** `#A0D8EF`：用于体重趋势、信息提示。
- **天空蓝 100** `#E8F6FC`：体重统计卡片背景。

### Neutrals（中性色）
- **深森绿 900** `#1A3C34`：主文本色，替代纯黑，更柔和。
- **深森绿 700** `#3D5A52`：二级文本。
- **深森绿 500** `#6B857E`：三级文本、占位符、禁用态。
- **深森绿 200** `#C5D3CF`：边框、分割线。
- **深森绿 100** `#E5EDEA`：卡片描边、浅色分割线。
- **米白 50** `#FAFDFC`：页面主背景。
- **纯白** `#FFFFFF`：卡片背景、输入框背景。

### Semantic Colors（语义色）
- **成功绿** `#4CAF79`
- **警告橙** `#FF9F5A`
- **错误红** `#FF6B6B`
- **信息蓝** `#5BBCE4`

## 3. Typography Rules

### Font Family
- **Display / Heading**：`HarmonyOS Sans SC`, `PingFang SC`, `Microsoft YaHei`, sans-serif
- **Body**：`HarmonyOS Sans SC`, `PingFang SC`, `Microsoft YaHei`, sans-serif

中文环境下不使用西文光学字号规则，采用更舒展的中文行高。

### Hierarchy

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Color |
|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| Display Hero | 32px | 700 | 1.25 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
| Section Heading | 22px | 700 | 1.3 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
| Card Title | 18px | 700 | 1.35 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
| Sub-heading | 16px | 600 | 1.4 | 0 | 深森绿 900 |
| Body | 15px | 400 | 1.55 | 0.02em | 深森绿 700 |
| Body Emphasis | 15px | 600 | 1.5 | 0.01em | 深森绿 900 |
| Caption | 13px | 400 | 1.45 | 0.02em | 深森绿 500 |
| Caption Bold | 13px | 600 | 1.4 | 0 | 深森绿 700 |
| Micro | 11px | 500 | 1.35 | 0.02em | 深森绿 500 |
| Button Large | 17px | 600 | 1 | 0.01em | 纯白 |
| Button | 15px | 600 | 1 | 0.01em | 纯白 |

### Principles
- 标题使用较大字重（700）增强信赖感。
- 正文行高 1.55，中文阅读更舒适。
- 标签/时间戳使用 Caption 或 Micro，保持界面清爽。

## 4. Component Stylings

### Buttons

**Primary CTA（薄荷绿实心）**
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #5ED7B6 0%, #3CB89A 100%)`
- Text: `#FFFFFF`
- Padding: 14px 24px
- Border Radius: 28px（大圆角药丸）
- Font: 16px, weight 600
- Shadow: `0 6px 16px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.32)`
- Active: scale 0.98，背景加深

**Secondary Button（白底描边）**
- Background: `#FFFFFF`
- Border: 1.5px solid `#E5EDEA`
- Text: 深森绿 900
- Padding: 12px 20px
- Border Radius: 24px
- Active: 背景变为薄荷绿 50

**Soft Button（浅薄荷底）**
- Background: `#E8FBF5`
- Text: 薄荷绿 600
- Padding: 10px 16px
- Border Radius: 20px
- Active: 背景变为薄荷绿 100

**Filter Chip**
- Default: bg `#FFFFFF`, border 1px `#E5EDEA`, text 深森绿 700
- Selected: bg 薄荷绿 100, text 薄荷绿 600, border 薄荷绿 500
- Border Radius: 20px
- Padding: 8px 16px

### Cards & Containers

**Standard Card**
- Background: `#FFFFFF`
- Border Radius: 24px
- Padding: 20px
- Shadow: `0 4px 20px rgba(26, 60, 52, 0.06)`
- Border: 1px solid `rgba(197, 211, 207, 0.4)`（极淡描边）

**Hero Card（首页顶部汇总）**
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #E8FBF5 0%, #FFFFFF 100%)`
- Border Radius: 28px
- Padding: 24px
- Shadow: `0 8px 28px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.18)`

**Reminder Card**
- Urgent: bg 肉垫粉 100, border 肉垫粉 500, shadow 带粉色光晕
- Normal: bg `#FFFFFF`, border 深森绿 100
- Done: bg 阳光黄 100, opacity 0.85
- Border Radius: 20px

**Medical Card**
- Background: 薰衣草紫 100
- Border: 1px solid 薰衣草紫 500 / 30%
- Border Radius: 20px

### Inputs

**Text Field**
- Background: `#FAFDFC`
- Border: 1px solid `#E5EDEA`
- Border Radius: 16px
- Padding: 14px 16px
- Focus: border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 0 0 3px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.15)`
- Placeholder: 深森绿 500

**Selector / Picker**
- Background: `#FFFFFF`
- Border: 1px solid `#E5EDEA`
- Border Radius: 16px
- Padding: 14px 16px
- Right icon: chevron-down

### Navigation

**Bottom Tab Bar**
- Background: `#FFFFFF`
- Height: 68px + safe area
- Border Top: 1px solid `#E5EDEA`
- Active icon/text: 薄荷绿 500
- Inactive icon/text: 深森绿 500
- Icon size: 24px
- Label: 11px, weight 500
- Top padding: 8px

**Top Header**
- Transparent or 米白 50
- Title: Section Heading, left aligned
- Right action: 肉垫粉 500 圆形按钮（+ / 设置）

## 5. Layout Principles

### Spacing System
- Base unit: 4px
- Scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 40, 48, 64
- 卡片之间默认 16px
- 页面水平内边距：16px

### Grid & Container
- 移动端内容区最大宽度：390px，居中
- 页面内所有卡片/列表在 16px 水平内边距内
- 首页顶部宠物头像横向滚动，超出屏幕可滑动
- 底部 Tab Bar 固定，宽度与内容区一致，不超过 390px

### Whitespace Philosophy
- 顶部留出 44-56px 状态栏/标题区
- 首屏核心内容（header + 汇总卡片 + 快捷入口）控制在 600vp 内
- 卡片内部信息密度适中，留出呼吸感
- 空状态使用大幅插画 + 引导按钮，避免信息压迫

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Treatment | Use |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| Flat | 无阴影，仅背景色 | 页面底层、分隔区块 |
| Card | `0 4px 20px rgba(26,60,52,0.06)` | 标准卡片 |
| Elevated Card | `0 8px 28px rgba(94,215,182,0.18)` | 首页汇总、重要 CTA 卡片 |
| Floating Button | `0 8px 24px rgba(94,215,182,0.35)` | 悬浮添加按钮 |
| Sheet | 顶部圆角 28px，背景 `#FFFFFF`，上方 overlay `rgba(26,60,52,0.35)` | 底部弹层 |
| Focus | `0 0 0 3px rgba(94,215,182,0.2)` | 输入框聚焦 |

## 7. Do's and Don'ts

### Do
- 使用大圆角（20px-28px）营造柔软感。
- 在卡片、按钮、关键区域使用薄荷绿到深薄荷的渐变。
- 使用肉垫粉作为头像光环、情感化点缀、urgent 提醒背景。
- 为每个图标级 SVG 提供语义化的 `<title>`。
- 保持底部 Tab 固定，不侧滑、不满铺。
- 为空状态设计独立插画与明确引导。

### Don't
- 不要使用尖锐直角（小于 12px）。
- 不要让同一屏幕出现 4 种以上高饱和强调色。
- 不要使用 emoji 作为 UI 图标。
- 不要把 Tab 导航放到侧边或顶部。
- 不要在首页一次性展示过多数字图表。

## 8. Responsive Behavior

### Target Device
- 宽度：1272vp × 2756vp
- 内容区 max-width：390-420vp，居中
- 底部 Tab Bar 宽度跟随 body，不超过 390px，左右 auto margin
- 在 PC 浏览器上禁止全宽拉伸

### Touch Targets
- 主按钮高度 ≥ 48px
- 图标按钮触摸区域 ≥ 44px
- Tab item 高度 68px
- 快捷记录入口 ≥ 72px × 72px

## 9. Semantic UI Binding

### Surfaces & Routes

| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID |
|------------|---------|-------|--------|
| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home |
| records | records-page | pages/Records | tab-records |
| trends | trends-page | pages/Trends | tab-trends |
| care | care-page | pages/Care | tab-care |
| profile | profile-page | pages/Profile | tab-profile |
| pet-picker | pet-picker-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| add-record | add-record-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| record-diet | record-diet-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| record-stool | record-stool-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| record-weight | record-weight-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| record-meds | record-meds-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| reminder-detail | reminder-detail-page | pages/ReminderDetail | - |
| medical-case | medical-case-page | pages/MedicalCase | - |
| medical-case-editor | medical-case-editor-page | pages/MedicalCaseEditor | - |
| family-invite | family-invite-sheet | (sheet) | - |
| pet-editor | pet-editor-page | pages/PetEditor | - |

### Key Semantic Targets to Preserve

- `home-pet-switcher`, `home-current-pet-avatar`, `home-current-pet-name`
- `home-quick-diet`, `home-quick-stool`, `home-quick-weight`, `home-quick-meds`
- `home-today-summary-list`, `home-reminder-list`, `home-empty-state`
- `records-filter-*`, `records-list`, `records-add-button`
- `trends-tab-*`, `trends-period-*`, `trends-chart`, `trends-stats-list`
- `care-tab-reminders`, `care-tab-medical`, `care-reminder-list`, `care-medical-list`
- `profile-manage-pets`, `profile-family`, `profile-settings`, `profile-about`
- Sheet 内的保存/关闭按钮：`record-*-save`, `record-*-close`, `add-record-*`, `pet-picker-*`
- 详情页：`reminder-detail-mark-done`, `reminder-detail-edit`, `reminder-detail-delete`
- 编辑器：`medical-editor-*`, `pet-editor-*`

### Event Names to Preserve

- `open-pet-picker`, `open-pet-editor`, `open-add-record`
- `open-record-diet`, `open-record-stool`, `open-record-weight`, `open-record-meds`
- `save-record-*`, `filter-records-*`, `switch-trends-*`, `set-period-*`
- `switch-care-reminders`, `switch-care-medical`, `open-reminder-editor`, `mark-reminder-done`, `delete-reminder`
- `open-medical-editor`, `save-medical-case`, `pick-medical-image`
- `open-family-invite`, `copy-invite-code`, `close-sheet`, `navigate-back`, `save-pet`

### Change Requests

- 无。当前语义协议已覆盖全部功能页面与关键交互目标。

content.content:
1	# 宠迹·PawLog 视觉设计系统（DESIGN1.md）
2	
3	## Review Summary
4	
5	DESIGN.md 已正确覆盖了薄荷绿 + 肉垫粉的治愈方向，但在视觉精致度上仍有提升空间：
6	1. 当前阴影系统较为单一，层次感不足。
7	2. 卡片内部用色可以更克制地引入第三色（薰衣草紫、天空蓝、阳光黄）来区分模块，而不是让所有卡片都是白底。
8	3. 毛玻璃（frosted glass）效果可增强高级感和层次。
9	4. 首页宠物头像与快捷按钮可做得更「肉感」，强化品牌记忆。
10	5. 需要确保 DESIGN.md 中所有语义 ID 与事件名在 HTML 中被保留。
11	
12	本文件在保留语义绑定、页面结构、目标设备约束的前提下，对颜色、阴影、渐变、组件质感进行第二轮精修。
13	
14	## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere
15	
16	### 核心氛围升级
17	- **Cloud & Paw**：云朵般的大圆角卡片 + 肉垫形状的按钮/头像光环。
18	- **Layered Freshness**：多层薄荷色阶（50/100/200/500/600）构建空间深度。
19	- **Soft Gel**：按钮与卡片使用柔和的半透明毛玻璃 + 渐变，像果冻一样Q弹。
20	- **Healing Data**：图表区域不冰冷，使用渐变填充 + 圆润数据点 + 柔和网格线。
21	
22	### 品牌意象
23	- 薄荷绿 = 清新、健康、呼吸感
24	- 肉垫粉 = 温柔、关爱、宠物触感
25	- 阳光黄 = 正向反馈、完成、奖励
26	- 薰衣草紫 = 医疗、专业、安心
27	
28	## 2. Color Palette & Roles
29	
30	### Primary
31	- **薄荷绿 600** `#3FC0A0`：CTA 按钮渐变终点、选中态、图表主色。
32	- **薄荷绿 500** `#5ED7B6`：CTA 按钮渐变起点、主图标色。
33	- **薄荷绿 300** `#9CEBD4`：图表填充、装饰性高亮。
34	- **薄荷绿 100** `#E5FAF4`：卡片浅底、选中 chip、输入框聚焦光环。
35	- **薄荷绿 50** `#F4FDFA`：页面主背景。
36	
37	### Secondary
38	- **肉垫粉 600** `#FF9AAE`： urgent 提醒、头像光环、强调标签。
39	- **肉垫粉 500** `#FFB3C1`：辅助按钮、情感化插画。
40	- **肉垫粉 100** `#FFF0F3`：提醒卡片背景、家庭共享卡片背景。
41	
42	### Accent Spectrum
43	- **阳光黄 500** `#FFD166`：完成标记、趋势上升、星级评分。
44	- **阳光黄 100** `#FFF9E6`：完成态背景。
45	- **天空蓝 500** `#87CEEB`：体重趋势、信息提示。
46	- **天空蓝 100** `#E6F5FB`：体重统计卡片背景。
47	- **薰衣草紫 500** `#B8B8E0`：病历、医疗图标。
48	- **薰衣草紫 100** `#F2F1FA`：病历卡片背景。
49	- **奶油杏 500** `#F4D0A4`：饮食记录主题色。
50	- **奶油杏 100** `#FDF5EA`：饮食统计卡片背景。
51	
52	### Neutrals
53	- **深森绿 900** `#163832`：主文本。
54	- **深森绿 700** `#3D5A52`：二级文本。
55	- **深森绿 500** `#6F8983`：三级文本、禁用态。
56	- **深森绿 200** `#C9D8D4`：分割线、浅边框。
57	- **深森绿 100** `#E3EDEA`：卡片描边。
58	- **米白 50** `#FAFDFC`：页面底。
59	- **纯白** `#FFFFFF`：卡片面。
60	
61	### Semantic
62	- 成功 `#4CC89A`
63	- 警告 `#FFAA5C`
64	- 错误 `#FF7474`
65	- 信息 `#5FC7E8`
66	
67	## 3. Typography Rules
68	
69	同 DESIGN.md，增加一条：
70	- 数字（体重、日期、统计）使用 `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` 保持对齐。
71	
72	## 4. Component Stylings（Refined）
73	
74	### Primary CTA
75	- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #5ED7B6 0%, #3FC0A0 55%, #2EB08F 100%)`
76	- Border Radius: 28px

78	- 顶部 1px 白色高光 `inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.35)`

84	- Border Radius: 24px

89	- Background: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72)`
90	- Backdrop Filter: `blur(18px) saturate(160%)`
91	- Border: 1px solid `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)`

94	- Use: 首页顶部汇总卡片、空状态卡片
95	
96	### Quick Action Button（首页四大入口）
97	- Size: 72px × 72px
98	- Border Radius: 24px
99	- Background: 每个入口使用不同浅色底 + 渐变图标容器
100	  - 饮食：奶油杏 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD8A8, #F4C288)`
101	  - 排泄：薄荷绿 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #9CEBD4, #5ED7B6)`
102	  - 体重：天空蓝 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #B2E3F5, #87CEEB)`
103	  - 用药：薰衣草紫 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #D4D4F0, #B8B8E0)`
104	- Shadow: `0 6px 18px rgba(22, 56, 50, 0.08)`
105	- Active: scale 0.95
106	
107	### Pet Avatar（首页顶部）
108	- Outer ring: 肉垫粉 500 或 薄荷绿 500（当前选中）
109	- Ring width: 3px
110	- Avatar size: 56px
111	- Border Radius: 50%
112	- Shadow: `0 4px 12px rgba(255, 179, 193, 0.28)`
113	- 未选中头像：无 ring，opacity 0.72
114	
115	### Reminder Card
116	- Urgent: bg 肉垫粉 100, border 肉垫粉 500, shadow `0 6px 20px rgba(255, 154, 174, 0.18)`
117	- Normal: bg 纯白, border 深森绿 100
118	- Done: bg 阳光黄 100, opacity 0.82
119	- 左侧竖条：4px 圆角条，颜色与状态对应
120	
121	### Medical Card
122	- bg 薰衣草紫 100
123	- 左侧图标容器：48px 圆角 16px，bg 薰衣草紫 500
124	- 图片缩略图：56px 圆角 12px
125	
126	### Trend Chart Container
127	- bg 纯白，border radius 24px
128	- 图表区域高度 220px
129	- 折线：薄荷绿 500，fill `rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.18)`
130	- 柱状图：薄荷绿 300 到 薄荷绿 500 渐变
131	- 网格线：深森绿 100，1px dashed
132	- 数据点：8px 圆形，薄荷绿 600，白色描边 2px
133	
134	### Filter Chip（v2）
135	- Default: bg 纯白, border 1px 深森绿 100
136	- Selected: bg 薄荷绿 100, text 薄荷绿 600, border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 2px 8px rgba(94,215,182,0.15)`
137	
138	### Text Field（v2）
139	- bg `#FAFDFC`
140	- border 1px `#E3EDEA`
141	- border radius 16px
142	- focus: border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 0 0 4px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.12)`
143	- 左侧可配图标（16px，深森绿 500）
144	
145	## 5. Layout Principles（Refined）
146	
147	- 页面顶部统一留出 52px 给状态栏 + 标题。
148	- 标题左侧可放宠物名，右侧放设置/添加按钮。
149	- 首页首屏：Header（52px）+ 宠物切换条（84px）+ 汇总玻璃卡片（~180px）+ 快捷入口（96px）+ 间距 = 约 520vp，符合 600vp 限制。
150	- 卡片间距：16px。
151	- 列表项间距：12px。
152	
153	## 6. Depth & Elevation（Refined）
154	
155	| Level | Treatment |
156	|-------|-----------|
157	| Page | bg 米白 50 |
158	| Standard Card | 双层柔和阴影 |
159	| Glass Card | 半透明 + blur + 白色内描边 |
160	| Floating Action | 薄荷绿弥散阴影 |
161	| Sheet | 顶部大圆角 + 深色 overlay |
162	| Pressed | scale 0.96-0.98 |
163	
164	## 7. Do's and Don'ts（Refined）
165	
166	### Do
167	- 在首页汇总卡片使用 Glass Card 效果。
168	- 让四大快捷按钮使用不同辅色，形成颜色节奏。
169	- 为每个状态（urgent/done/normal）设计专属卡片色彩。
170	- 使用图表渐变填充，避免纯线条图表。
171	
172	### Don't
173	- 不要让白底卡片堆叠在一起没有阴影区分。
174	- 不要在同一列表中混合超过 3 种高饱和标签色。
175	- 不要给所有按钮相同颜色，失去入口识别度。
176	
177	## 8. Responsive Behavior
178	
179	同 DESIGN.md。强调：
180	- HTML 设计稿宽度 390px，body `max-width: 390px; margin: 0 auto;`。
181	- 底部 Tab Bar 使用 `position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; max-width: 390px; margin: 0 auto;`。
182	- 禁止侧边导航、禁止 PC 全宽。
183	
184	## 9. Semantic UI Binding
185	
186	同 DESIGN.md，完整保留所有 surface/page/route/tab ID、semantic target ID、event name、binding path。
187	
188	### 重申关键语义目标
189	- `home-pet-switcher`, `home-current-pet-avatar`, `home-current-pet-name`
190	- `home-quick-diet`, `home-quick-stool`, `home-quick-weight`, `home-quick-meds`
191	- `home-today-summary-list`, `home-reminder-list`

file.content:
# 宠迹·PawLog 视觉设计系统（DESIGN1.md）

## Review Summary

DESIGN.md 已正确覆盖了薄荷绿 + 肉垫粉的治愈方向，但在视觉精致度上仍有提升空间：
1. 当前阴影系统较为单一，层次感不足。
2. 卡片内部用色可以更克制地引入第三色（薰衣草紫、天空蓝、阳光黄）来区分模块，而不是让所有卡片都是白底。
3. 毛玻璃（frosted glass）效果可增强高级感和层次。
4. 首页宠物头像与快捷按钮可做得更「肉感」，强化品牌记忆。
5. 需要确保 DESIGN.md 中所有语义 ID 与事件名在 HTML 中被保留。

本文件在保留语义绑定、页面结构、目标设备约束的前提下，对颜色、阴影、渐变、组件质感进行第二轮精修。

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

### 核心氛围升级
- **Cloud & Paw**：云朵般的大圆角卡片 + 肉垫形状的按钮/头像光环。
- **Layered Freshness**：多层薄荷色阶（50/100/200/500/600）构建空间深度。
- **Soft Gel**：按钮与卡片使用柔和的半透明毛玻璃 + 渐变，像果冻一样Q弹。
- **Healing Data**：图表区域不冰冷，使用渐变填充 + 圆润数据点 + 柔和网格线。

### 品牌意象
- 薄荷绿 = 清新、健康、呼吸感
- 肉垫粉 = 温柔、关爱、宠物触感
- 阳光黄 = 正向反馈、完成、奖励
- 薰衣草紫 = 医疗、专业、安心

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Primary
- **薄荷绿 600** `#3FC0A0`：CTA 按钮渐变终点、选中态、图表主色。
- **薄荷绿 500** `#5ED7B6`：CTA 按钮渐变起点、主图标色。
- **薄荷绿 300** `#9CEBD4`：图表填充、装饰性高亮。
- **薄荷绿 100** `#E5FAF4`：卡片浅底、选中 chip、输入框聚焦光环。
- **薄荷绿 50** `#F4FDFA`：页面主背景。

### Secondary
- **肉垫粉 600** `#FF9AAE`： urgent 提醒、头像光环、强调标签。
- **肉垫粉 500** `#FFB3C1`：辅助按钮、情感化插画。
- **肉垫粉 100** `#FFF0F3`：提醒卡片背景、家庭共享卡片背景。

### Accent Spectrum
- **阳光黄 500** `#FFD166`：完成标记、趋势上升、星级评分。
- **阳光黄 100** `#FFF9E6`：完成态背景。
- **天空蓝 500** `#87CEEB`：体重趋势、信息提示。
- **天空蓝 100** `#E6F5FB`：体重统计卡片背景。
- **薰衣草紫 500** `#B8B8E0`：病历、医疗图标。
- **薰衣草紫 100** `#F2F1FA`：病历卡片背景。
- **奶油杏 500** `#F4D0A4`：饮食记录主题色。
- **奶油杏 100** `#FDF5EA`：饮食统计卡片背景。

### Neutrals
- **深森绿 900** `#163832`：主文本。
- **深森绿 700** `#3D5A52`：二级文本。
- **深森绿 500** `#6F8983`：三级文本、禁用态。
- **深森绿 200** `#C9D8D4`：分割线、浅边框。
- **深森绿 100** `#E3EDEA`：卡片描边。
- **米白 50** `#FAFDFC`：页面底。
- **纯白** `#FFFFFF`：卡片面。

### Semantic
- 成功 `#4CC89A`
- 警告 `#FFAA5C`
- 错误 `#FF7474`
- 信息 `#5FC7E8`

## 3. Typography Rules

同 DESIGN.md，增加一条：
- 数字（体重、日期、统计）使用 `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` 保持对齐。

## 4. Component Stylings（Refined）

### Primary CTA
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #5ED7B6 0%, #3FC0A0 55%, #2EB08F 100%)`
- Border Radius: 28px
- Shadow: `0 8px 22px rgba(62, 192, 160, 0.38)`
- 顶部 1px 白色高光 `inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.35)`
- Active: scale 0.97, 阴影收缩

### Standard Card（v2）
- Background: `#FFFFFF`
- Border: 1px solid `rgba(201, 216, 212, 0.45)`
- Border Radius: 24px
- Shadow: `0 6px 24px rgba(22, 56, 50, 0.06), 0 2px 8px rgba(22, 56, 50, 0.04)`
- Padding: 20px

### Glass Card（新增）
- Background: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72)`
- Backdrop Filter: `blur(18px) saturate(160%)`
- Border: 1px solid `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)`
- Border Radius: 24px
- Shadow: `0 8px 32px rgba(22, 56, 50, 0.08)`
- Use: 首页顶部汇总卡片、空状态卡片

### Quick Action Button（首页四大入口）
- Size: 72px × 72px
- Border Radius: 24px
- Background: 每个入口使用不同浅色底 + 渐变图标容器
  - 饮食：奶油杏 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD8A8, #F4C288)`
  - 排泄：薄荷绿 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #9CEBD4, #5ED7B6)`
  - 体重：天空蓝 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #B2E3F5, #87CEEB)`
  - 用药：薰衣草紫 100，图标容器 `linear-gradient(135deg, #D4D4F0, #B8B8E0)`
- Shadow: `0 6px 18px rgba(22, 56, 50, 0.08)`
- Active: scale 0.95

### Pet Avatar（首页顶部）
- Outer ring: 肉垫粉 500 或 薄荷绿 500（当前选中）
- Ring width: 3px
- Avatar size: 56px
- Border Radius: 50%
- Shadow: `0 4px 12px rgba(255, 179, 193, 0.28)`
- 未选中头像：无 ring，opacity 0.72

### Reminder Card
- Urgent: bg 肉垫粉 100, border 肉垫粉 500, shadow `0 6px 20px rgba(255, 154, 174, 0.18)`
- Normal: bg 纯白, border 深森绿 100
- Done: bg 阳光黄 100, opacity 0.82
- 左侧竖条：4px 圆角条，颜色与状态对应

### Medical Card
- bg 薰衣草紫 100
- 左侧图标容器：48px 圆角 16px，bg 薰衣草紫 500
- 图片缩略图：56px 圆角 12px

### Trend Chart Container
- bg 纯白，border radius 24px
- 图表区域高度 220px
- 折线：薄荷绿 500，fill `rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.18)`
- 柱状图：薄荷绿 300 到 薄荷绿 500 渐变
- 网格线：深森绿 100，1px dashed
- 数据点：8px 圆形，薄荷绿 600，白色描边 2px

### Filter Chip（v2）
- Default: bg 纯白, border 1px 深森绿 100
- Selected: bg 薄荷绿 100, text 薄荷绿 600, border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 2px 8px rgba(94,215,182,0.15)`

### Text Field（v2）
- bg `#FAFDFC`
- border 1px `#E3EDEA`
- border radius 16px
- focus: border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 0 0 4px rgba(94, 215, 182, 0.12)`
- 左侧可配图标（16px，深森绿 500）

## 5. Layout Principles（Refined）

- 页面顶部统一留出 52px 给状态栏 + 标题。
- 标题左侧可放宠物名，右侧放设置/添加按钮。
- 首页首屏：Header（52px）+ 宠物切换条（84px）+ 汇总玻璃卡片（~180px）+ 快捷入口（96px）+ 间距 = 约 520vp，符合 600vp 限制。
- 卡片间距：16px。
- 列表项间距：12px。

## 6. Depth & Elevation（Refined）

| Level | Treatment |
|-------|-----------|
| Page | bg 米白 50 |
| Standard Card | 双层柔和阴影 |
| Glass Card | 半透明 + blur + 白色内描边 |
| Floating Action | 薄荷绿弥散阴影 |
| Sheet | 顶部大圆角 + 深色 overlay |
| Pressed | scale 0.96-0.98 |

## 7. Do's and Don'ts（Refined）

### Do
- 在首页汇总卡片使用 Glass Card 效果。
- 让四大快捷按钮使用不同辅色，形成颜色节奏。
- 为每个状态（urgent/done/normal）设计专属卡片色彩。
- 使用图表渐变填充，避免纯线条图表。

### Don't
- 不要让白底卡片堆叠在一起没有阴影区分。
- 不要在同一列表中混合超过 3 种高饱和标签色。
- 不要给所有按钮相同颜色，失去入口识别度。

## 8. Responsive Behavior

同 DESIGN.md。强调：
- HTML 设计稿宽度 390px，body `max-width: 390px; margin: 0 auto;`。
- 底部 Tab Bar 使用 `position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; max-width: 390px; margin: 0 auto;`。
- 禁止侧边导航、禁止 PC 全宽。

## 9. Semantic UI Binding

同 DESIGN.md，完整保留所有 surface/page/route/tab ID、semantic target ID、event name、binding path。

### 重申关键语义目标
- `home-pet-switcher`, `home-current-pet-avatar`, `home-current-pet-name`
- `home-quick-diet`, `home-quick-stool`, `home-quick-weight`, `home-quick-meds`
- `home-today-summary-list`, `home-reminder-list`
- `records-filter-*`, `records-list`, `records-add-button`
- `trends-tab-*`, `trends-period-*`, `trends-chart`, `trends-stats-list`
- `care-tab-reminders`, `care-tab-medical`, `care-reminder-list`, `care-medical-list`
- `profile-manage-pets`, `profile-family`, `profile-settings`, `profile-about`
- `record-*-save`, `record-*-close`, `add-record-*`, `pet-picker-*`
- `reminder-detail-mark-done`, `reminder-detail-edit`, `reminder-detail-delete`
- `medical-editor-*`, `pet-editor-*`, `family-invite-code`, `family-invite-copy`

### 事件名完整保留
同 DESIGN.md。

### 变更请求
- 无。

1	# 宠迹·PawLog 视觉设计系统（DESIGN2.md）
2	
3	## Final Review Summary
4	
5	DESIGN1.md 在色彩层次、阴影质感、毛玻璃效果、快捷入口识别度上已有明显提升。经过第三轮审视，进一步做以下精修，确保最终 HTML artifact 呈现出「不 AI 模板化」的高级治愈感：
6	
7	1. **加入纸质/手账元素**：轻度的虚线、圆点、手绘感圆角，让界面更像一本宠物手账。
8	2. **强化数据可视化质感**：趋势图使用更柔和的渐变面积图 + 圆润数据点 + 隐藏坐标轴线。
9	3. **状态徽章系统化**：饮食/排泄/体重/用药使用一套一致但色彩区分的徽章。
10	4. **空状态插画化**：使用大尺寸的扁平插画风格占位，而不是纯图标。
11	5. **动效暗示**：在 HTML 中通过 hover/active 状态暗示按压反馈（scale、阴影收缩）。
12	
13	本文件是最终设计定稿，后续 HTML artifact 必须严格遵循。
14	
15	## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere
16	
17	### 最终氛围
18	**「一本会呼吸的宠物手账」**
19	
20	- 页面背景像手账内页的浅薄荷纸。
21	- 卡片像贴在手账上的便签，边缘柔和，偶尔带一点淡色描边。
22	- 按钮像肉垫按下的印记，Q 弹有反馈。
23	- 图表像手绘的曲线，但数据精确。

25	
26	### 设计关键词

28	
29	## 2. Color Palette & Roles（Final）

197	## 7. Do's and Don'ts（Final）
198	
199	### Do
200	- 使用圆角 ≥ 16px。
201	- 多使用渐变和半透明营造层次。
202	- 为不同功能入口分配不同辅色。
203	- 为空状态设计专属插画区域。
204	- 所有 SVG 图标加语义化 title。
205	
206	### Don't
207	- 不要使用直角或过小圆角。
208	- 不要让同一屏幕颜色过于杂乱。
209	- 不要使用 emoji 作为图标。
210	- 不要把 Tab 导航放在顶部或侧边。
211	- 不要让底部 Tab Bar 在 PC 上全宽。
212	
213	## 8. Responsive Behavior（Final）
214	
215	同 DESIGN.md / DESIGN1.md。
216	
217	## 9. Semantic UI Binding（Final）
218	
219	完整保留 DESIGN.md 中列出的所有 surface/page/route/tab、semantic target ID、event name、binding path。HTML artifact 中所有对应元素必须携带 `data-ui-id`，且不得修改 ID 或事件名。
220	
221	### 变更请求
222	- 无。本文件为最终视觉定稿。

file.content:
# 宠迹·PawLog 视觉设计系统（DESIGN2.md）

## Final Review Summary

DESIGN1.md 在色彩层次、阴影质感、毛玻璃效果、快捷入口识别度上已有明显提升。经过第三轮审视，进一步做以下精修，确保最终 HTML artifact 呈现出「不 AI 模板化」的高级治愈感：

1. **加入纸质/手账元素**：轻度的虚线、圆点、手绘感圆角，让界面更像一本宠物手账。
2. **强化数据可视化质感**：趋势图使用更柔和的渐变面积图 + 圆润数据点 + 隐藏坐标轴线。
3. **状态徽章系统化**：饮食/排泄/体重/用药使用一套一致但色彩区分的徽章。
4. **空状态插画化**：使用大尺寸的扁平插画风格占位，而不是纯图标。
5. **动效暗示**：在 HTML 中通过 hover/active 状态暗示按压反馈（scale、阴影收缩）。

本文件是最终设计定稿，后续 HTML artifact 必须严格遵循。

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

### 最终氛围
**「一本会呼吸的宠物手账」**

- 页面背景像手账内页的浅薄荷纸。
- 卡片像贴在手账上的便签，边缘柔和，偶尔带一点淡色描边。
- 按钮像肉垫按下的印记，Q 弹有反馈。
- 图表像手绘的曲线，但数据精确。
- 空状态像一页等待主人填写的空白手账。

### 设计关键词
- 清新、柔软、治愈、手账、肉垫、云感、果冻

## 2. Color Palette & Roles（Final）

### Primary
- `#3FC0A0` 薄荷绿 600
- `#5ED7B6` 薄荷绿 500
- `#9CEBD4` 薄荷绿 300
- `#E5FAF4` 薄荷绿 100
- `#F4FDFA` 薄荷绿 50 / 页面底

### Secondary
- `#FF9AAE` 肉垫粉 600
- `#FFB3C1` 肉垫粉 500
- `#FFF0F3` 肉垫粉 100

### Accent
- `#FFD166` 阳光黄 500
- `#FFF9E6` 阳光黄 100
- `#87CEEB` 天空蓝 500
- `#E6F5FB` 天空蓝 100
- `#B8B8E0` 薰衣草紫 500
- `#F2F1FA` 薰衣草紫 100
- `#F4D0A4` 奶油杏 500
- `#FDF5EA` 奶油杏 100

### Neutrals
- `#163832` 深森绿 900
- `#3D5A52` 深森绿 700
- `#6F8983` 深森绿 500
- `#C9D8D4` 深森绿 200
- `#E3EDEA` 深森绿 100
- `#FFFFFF` 纯白

## 3. Typography Rules（Final）

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Color |
|------|------|--------|-------------|-------|
| Display Hero | 34px | 800 | 1.2 | 深森绿 900 |
| Section Heading | 22px | 700 | 1.3 | 深森绿 900 |
| Card Title | 18px | 700 | 1.35 | 深森绿 900 |
| Sub-heading | 16px | 600 | 1.4 | 深森绿 900 |
| Body | 15px | 400 | 1.6 | 深森绿 700 |
| Body Emphasis | 15px | 600 | 1.5 | 深森绿 900 |
| Caption | 13px | 400 | 1.45 | 深森绿 500 |
| Caption Bold | 13px | 600 | 1.4 | 深森绿 700 |
| Micro | 11px | 500 | 1.35 | 深森绿 500 |
| Button Large | 17px | 700 | 1 | 纯白 |
| Button | 15px | 600 | 1 | 纯白 |

中文数字使用 tabular-nums。

## 4. Component Stylings（Final）

### Primary CTA
- bg: `linear-gradient(135deg, #5ED7B6 0%, #3FC0A0 50%, #2DB08E 100%)`
- color: white
- border-radius: 28px
- padding: 15px 28px
- box-shadow: `0 8px 24px rgba(63, 192, 160, 0.38), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.35)`
- active: transform scale(0.97), box-shadow 收缩

### Secondary Button
- bg: white
- border: 1.5px solid `#E3EDEA`
- color: 深森绿 900
- border-radius: 24px
- active: bg `#F4FDFA`

### Soft Button
- bg: `#E5FAF4`
- color: 薄荷绿 600
- border-radius: 20px
- active: bg `#D4F5EC`

### Glass Card（首页汇总、空状态）
- bg: `rgba(255,255,255,0.76)`
- backdrop-filter: `blur(20px) saturate(150%)`
- border: 1px solid `rgba(255,255,255,0.65)`
- border-radius: 28px
- box-shadow: `0 8px 32px rgba(22,56,50,0.07)`

### Standard Card
- bg: white
- border: 1px solid `rgba(201,216,212,0.45)`
- border-radius: 24px
- box-shadow: `0 6px 22px rgba(22,56,50,0.05), 0 2px 8px rgba(22,56,50,0.04)`
- padding: 20px

### Quick Action Button（Final）
- 72px × 72px, border-radius 24px
- 饮食：bg 奶油杏 100, 图标渐变 `#FFD8A8 → #F4C288`
- 排泄：bg 薄荷绿 100, 图标渐变 `#9CEBD4 → #5ED7B6`
- 体重：bg 天空蓝 100, 图标渐变 `#B2E3F5 → #87CEEB`
- 用药：bg 薰衣草紫 100, 图标渐变 `#D4D4F0 → #B8B8E0`
- shadow: `0 6px 18px rgba(22,56,50,0.08)`
- active: scale 0.94
- 标签：13px, 600, 深森绿 900, 位于按钮下方 8px

### Pet Avatar
- 选中：外环 3px 薄荷绿 500，shadow `0 4px 14px rgba(94,215,182,0.28)`
- 未选中：无外环，opacity 0.75
- 头像 56px，圆形
- 添加按钮：56px 圆形，bg 薄荷绿 100，图标 薄荷绿 600

### Reminder Card
- 左侧 4px 状态条，圆角 2px
- Urgent: bg 肉垫粉 100, 状态条 肉垫粉 600, shadow `0 6px 18px rgba(255,154,174,0.16)`
- Normal: bg white, 状态条 薄荷绿 500
- Done: bg 阳光黄 100, 状态条 阳光黄 500, opacity 0.82
- 内边距 16px

### Medical Card
- bg 薰衣草紫 100
- 左侧 48px 图标容器，16px 圆角，bg 薰衣草紫 500
- 标题 16px bold，医院/日期 caption
- 缩略图 56px，12px 圆角

### Trend Chart
- 容器：Standard Card
- 图表高度 220px
- 面积图：fill `linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(94,215,182,0.35) 0%, rgba(94,215,182,0) 100%)`
- 折线：薄荷绿 600，3px
- 数据点：10px 圆形，bg 薄荷绿 600，border 2px white，shadow `0 2px 6px rgba(94,215,182,0.35)`
- 网格线：深森绿 100，1px dashed，透明度 0.5
- 坐标轴文字：11px，深森绿 500

### Filter Chip（Final）
- default: bg white, border 1px 深森绿 100, color 深森绿 700
- selected: bg `#E5FAF4`, color 薄荷绿 600, border 薄荷绿 500, shadow `0 2px 8px rgba(94,215,182,0.12)`
- border-radius: 20px
- padding: 8px 16px

### Text Field（Final）
- bg `#FAFDFC`
- border 1px `#E3EDEA`
- border-radius 16px
- padding 14px 16px
- focus: border 薄荷绿 500, box-shadow `0 0 0 4px rgba(94,215,182,0.12)`
- placeholder 深森绿 500
- 左侧 icon 16px

### Empty State
- 大插画占位：120px × 120px，圆角 32px，bg 薄荷绿 50
- 标题：18px bold
- 说明：15px，深森绿 700
- CTA：Primary CTA 或 Secondary Button

## 5. Layout Principles（Final）

- body: max-width 390px, margin 0 auto, bg 米白 50
- 页面水平 padding: 16px
- Header 高度 52px
- 宠物切换条高度 84px
- 卡片间距 16px
- 列表项间距 12px
- 底部 Tab Bar 高度 68px + safe area

## 6. Depth & Elevation（Final）

| Level | Treatment |
|-------|-----------|
| Page | 米白 50 |
| Standard Card | 双层柔和阴影 |
| Glass Card | 毛玻璃 + 白色内描边 |
| Quick Action | 柔和弥散阴影 |
| Floating Button | 薄荷绿弥散阴影 |
| Sheet | 顶部 28px 圆角 + 深色 overlay |
| Pressed | scale 0.94-0.97 |

## 7. Do's and Don'ts（Final）

### Do
- 使用圆角 ≥ 16px。
- 多使用渐变和半透明营造层次。
- 为不同功能入口分配不同辅色。
- 为空状态设计专属插画区域。
- 所有 SVG 图标加语义化 title。

### Don't
- 不要使用直角或过小圆角。
- 不要让同一屏幕颜色过于杂乱。
- 不要使用 emoji 作为图标。
- 不要把 Tab 导航放在顶部或侧边。
- 不要让底部 Tab Bar 在 PC 上全宽。

## 8. Responsive Behavior（Final）

同 DESIGN.md / DESIGN1.md。

## 9. Semantic UI Binding（Final）

完整保留 DESIGN.md 中列出的所有 surface/page/route/tab、semantic target ID、event name、binding path。HTML artifact 中所有对应元素必须携带 `data-ui-id`，且不得修改 ID 或事件名。

### 变更请求
- 无。本文件为最终视觉定稿。

The visual alignment handoff has arrived. I should finish the current coherent logic edit (which is the AppViewModel with a dynamic import issue) and then continue directly into Visual Integration Mode.

The AppViewModel has a problem: it uses `await import('../models/AppTypes')` inside a non-async method `refreshTrends()`. This won't work. I need to fix this. Since TrendDataset is a class in AppTypes.ets, I can import it directly at the top. Let me fix that.

Then I need to continue with visual integration. Given the scale of this task, this is a substantial implementation. I should consider using team-based execution or at least being efficient. The skill says: "If work is tightly coupled or uncertain, prefer one leader-owned implementation path instead of spawning teammates."

Given the large number of files and the need for consistency, and since I'm already deep into the implementation, I'll continue leader-owned but may spawn agents for parallel work on independent files once I establish the patterns.

Let me first fix the AppViewModel dynamic import issue, then continue implementing the visual layer.

import {

Base directory for this skill: /Users/huaweiide/Desktop/fe/code/harmony-pilot/skills/arkts-lint-build-repair

# ArkTS Lint Build Repair

Use after `CheckArktsFiles`, `CompileArkTS`, `build_project`, or `hvigor assembleApp` reports diagnostics. Goal: fix root causes, not only silence the first error.

## Core Loop

1. Capture exact diagnostics: file, line, severity, code, message.
2. Group by root cause; fix one class across all affected files.
3. Do not treat `ok: true` from `CheckArktsFiles` as clean if diagnostics include `severity: Error`.
4. Do not call warnings harmless until checking whether they affect runtime state or build registration.
5. Rerun the same check; if `main_pages.json`, resources, `module.json5`, entry pages, or imports changed, run a real project build.
6. Report remaining warnings separately from build success.

## Route By Diagnostic

- `main_pages.json`, `@Entry`, "must have one and only one '@Entry'", page registration, real `assembleApp`: read `references/entry-build.md`.
- `arkts-no-untyped-obj-literals`, `arkts-no-obj-literals-as-types`, `arkts-no-any-unknown`, private access, missing method, `FontWeight.SemiBold`, `GridItem.justifyContent`, `placeholder`, `noNonUISyntax`: read `references/arkts-types-dsl.md`.
- `Property 'x' has no initializer`, `arkts-no-definite-assignment`, `vm!`, `@Prop`, `@Link`, `@ObjectLink`, shared state not refreshing: read `references/component-state-inputs.md`.
- Repeated failures, build tool discovery, when to rerun `CheckArktsFiles` vs `hvigor`: read `references/verification-loop.md`.

## Hard Rules

- Never fix component input initialization by defaulting to `vm!` / `viewModel!` when UI renders mutable fields from that object.
- Never register tab child components in `main_pages.json`; only registered page entries get `@Entry`.
- Never assume `which hvigor` is sufficient. Check DevEco hvigor paths and project-level build tasks.
- Never stop at static check after entry/profile/resource changes; run the real build.
- Never introduce anonymous object return types in generated ArkTS; use named classes/interfaces.

## Fast Triage Table

| Message fragment | Load | Preferred repair |
|---|---|---|
| `must have one and only one '@Entry'` | `entry-build.md` | Keep only real entry pages in `main_pages.json`; shell `Index` for Tabs |
| `Object literal must correspond...` | `arkts-types-dsl.md` | Named class/interface; align callee parameter type |
| `Object literals cannot be used as type declarations` | `arkts-types-dsl.md` | Replace inline `{ x: T }` type with named type |
| `Only UI component syntax can be written here` | `arkts-types-dsl.md` | Move `let/return/loops` out of `build/@Builder` UI blocks |
| `Property 'SemiBold' does not exist` | `arkts-types-dsl.md` | Use `FontWeight.Medium` or `FontWeight.Bold` |
| `GridItemAttribute.justifyContent` | `arkts-types-dsl.md` | Put `Column/Row` inside `GridItem`, align inner container |
| `Property 'vm' has no initializer` | `component-state-inputs.md` | Choose `@Prop/@Link/@ObjectLink/callback`; do not default to `!` |
| `arkts-no-definite-assignment` | `component-state-inputs.md` | Treat as unresolved ownership warning for dynamic UI |
| `hvigor not found` | `verification-loop.md` | Try DevEco `hvigorw`, project tasks, or build connector |


ARGUMENTS: Fix ArkTS lint errors in this HarmonyOS project. Issues: SvgIcon.ets uses LineCapType/LineJoinType but should use LineCapStyle/LineJoinStyle. RecordRepository.ets uses 'Record' as generic type and references RecordPayload which isn't imported. PetRepository.ets assigns string to Gender. PageContext.ets uses NavPathStack which is not exported from @kit.ArkUI. AppViewModel.ets assigns ReminderListItem[] to Reminder[] fields.

1	# ArkTS Types And ArkUI DSL Repair
2	
3	## Object Literal Type Rules
4	
5	Messages:
6	
7	```text
8	Object literal must correspond to some explicitly declared class or interface
9	Object literals cannot be used as type declarations
10	Use explicit types instead of "any", "unknown"
11	```
12	
13	Do:
14	
15	```ts
16	export interface MonthRef {
17	  year: number
18	  month: number
19	}
20	
21	export class DailyRecordJson {
22	  date: string = ''
23	  drank: boolean = false
24	  note: string = ''
25	}
26	
27	nextMonth(year: number, month: number): MonthRef {
28	  return { year: 2026, month: 7 } as MonthRef
29	}
30	```
31	
32	Avoid:
33	
34	```ts
35	nextMonth(): { year: number, month: number } { ... }
36	return { date: this.date, drank: this.drank }
37	```
38	
39	Also align callee types. If a function expects `Record<string, string | number | boolean>`, an interface without an index signature is not assignable. Prefer a named class/interface for fixed shape and change callee type to that shape; use `Record<string, ...>` only for dynamic dictionaries.
40	
41	## Private Access / Missing Method
42	
43	Messages:
44	
45	```text
46	Property 'xService' is private and only accessible within class
47	Property 'computeX' does not exist on type 'ViewModel'
48	```
49	
50	Do not make services public just for UI. Add a small public VM method or computed state:
51	
52	```ts
53	computeMonthRate(year: number, month: number): number {
54	  return this.statsService.computeMonthRate(this.records, year, month)
55	}
56	```
57	
58	## ArkUI UI DSL Restrictions
59	
60	Messages:
61	
62	```text
63	Only UI component syntax can be written here
64	noNonUISyntax
65	```
66	
67	Avoid inside `build()` or `@Builder` UI blocks:
68	
69	```ts
70	let stats = this.countStats()
71	return
72	for (...) {}
73	```
74	
75	Do:
76	
77	```ts
78	@State private soberCount: number = 0
79	
80	private refreshStats(): void {
81	  this.soberCount = this.countSober()
82	}
83	
84	@Builder
85	dayCell(day: CalendarDay) {
86	  if (day.isCurrentMonth) {
87	    Column() { Text(`${day.dayOfMonth}`) }
88	  } else {
89	    Blank()
90	      .width(44)
91	      .height(44)
92	  }
93	}
94	```
95	
96	## Common ArkUI API Corrections
97	
98	`FontWeight.SemiBold` does not exist. Use:
99	
100	```ts
101	FontWeight.Medium
102	FontWeight.Bold
103	```
104	
105	`GridItem` does not support `.justifyContent(...)`. Put an alignable container inside:
106	
107	```ts
108	GridItem() {
109	  Column() {
110	    Text('1')
111	  }
112	  .width('100%')
113	  .height(44)
114	  .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
115	  .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Center)
116	}
117	```
118	
119	`constraintStyle` is not a standard ArkUI attribute. Usually use:
120	
121	```ts
122	.constraintSize({ maxWidth: 420 })
123	```
124	
125	or parent `.width('100%')` plus content padding.
126	
127	`TextInput.placeholder(...)` / `TextArea.placeholder(...)` are not attribute methods. Use constructor options:
128	
129	```ts
130	TextInput({ text: this.name, placeholder: 'Nickname' })
131	TextArea({ text: this.note, placeholder: 'Note' })
132	```
133	
134	`ForEach` callbacks should be typed and keyed:
135	
136	```ts
137	ForEach(this.days, (day: CalendarDay) => {
138	  DayCell({ day })
139	}, (day: CalendarDay) => day.date)
140	```
141	
142	If index typing causes diagnostics, remove index-dependent styling or precompute row data with named fields.
143

file.content:
# ArkTS Types And ArkUI DSL Repair

## Object Literal Type Rules

Messages:

```text
Object literal must correspond to some explicitly declared class or interface
Object literals cannot be used as type declarations
Use explicit types instead of "any", "unknown"
```

Do:

```ts
export interface MonthRef {
  year: number
  month: number
}

export class DailyRecordJson {
  date: string = ''
  drank: boolean = false
  note: string = ''
}

nextMonth(year: number, month: number): MonthRef {
  return { year: 2026, month: 7 } as MonthRef
}
```

Avoid:

```ts
nextMonth(): { year: number, month: number } { ... }
return { date: this.date, drank: this.drank }
```

Also align callee types. If a function expects `Record<string, string | number | boolean>`, an interface without an index signature is not assignable. Prefer a named class/interface for fixed shape and change callee type to that shape; use `Record<string, ...>` only for dynamic dictionaries.

## Private Access / Missing Method

Messages:

```text
Property 'xService' is private and only accessible within class
Property 'computeX' does not exist on type 'ViewModel'
```

Do not make services public just for UI. Add a small public VM method or computed state:

```ts
computeMonthRate(year: number, month: number): number {
  return this.statsService.computeMonthRate(this.records, year, month)
}
```

## ArkUI UI DSL Restrictions

Messages:

```text
Only UI component syntax can be written here
noNonUISyntax
```

Avoid inside `build()` or `@Builder` UI blocks:

```ts
let stats = this.countStats()
return
for (...) {}
```

Do:

```ts
@State private soberCount: number = 0

private refreshStats(): void {
  this.soberCount = this.countSober()
}

@Builder
dayCell(day: CalendarDay) {
  if (day.isCurrentMonth) {
    Column() { Text(`${day.dayOfMonth}`) }
  } else {
    Blank()
      .width(44)
      .height(44)
  }
}
```

## Common ArkUI API Corrections

`FontWeight.SemiBold` does not exist. Use:

```ts
FontWeight.Medium
FontWeight.Bold
```

`GridItem` does not support `.justifyContent(...)`. Put an alignable container inside:

```ts
GridItem() {
  Column() {
    Text('1')
  }
  .width('100%')
  .height(44)
  .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
  .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Center)
}
```

`constraintStyle` is not a standard ArkUI attribute. Usually use:

```ts
.constraintSize({ maxWidth: 420 })
```

or parent `.width('100%')` plus content padding.

`TextInput.placeholder(...)` / `TextArea.placeholder(...)` are not attribute methods. Use constructor options:

```ts
TextInput({ text: this.name, placeholder: 'Nickname' })
TextArea({ text: this.note, placeholder: 'Note' })
```

`ForEach` callbacks should be typed and keyed:

```ts
ForEach(this.days, (day: CalendarDay) => {
  DayCell({ day })
}, (day: CalendarDay) => day.date)
```

If index typing causes diagnostics, remove index-dependent styling or precompute row data with named fields.

content.content:
1	# Component State And Inputs Repair
2	
3	## Initializer Diagnostics
4	
5	Messages:
6	
7	```text
8	Property 'vm' has no initializer and is not definitely assigned in the constructor
9	Definite assignment assertions are not supported (arkts-no-definite-assignment)
10	```
11	
12	Do not automatically change:
13	
14	```ts
15	vm: AppViewModel
16	```
17	
18	to:
19	
20	```ts
21	vm!: AppViewModel
22	```
23	
24	For UI that renders mutable VM fields, `vm!` silences initialization but does not define ArkUI state ownership and can leave runtime UI stale.
25	
26	## Decision Table
27	
28	| Child needs | Parent owns | Child declaration | Parent call |
29	|---|---|---|---|
30	| read immutable primitive/string | value | `@Prop title: string = ''` | `Child({ title: this.title })` |
31	| edit parent primitive | `@State query` | `@Link query: string` | `Child({ query: $query })` |
32	| observe shared object fields | `@State appState: AppState` where `AppState` is `@Observed` | `@ObjectLink state: AppState` | `Child({ state: this.appState })` |
33	| trigger behavior only | method/service | `onSave: () => void = () => {}` | `Child({ onSave: () => this.save() })` |
34	| service with no UI refresh | plain private service | `service: Service = new Service()` or constructor-owned | `Child({ service: this.service })` |
35	
36	## Shared ViewModel Pattern
37	
38	Prefer VM as command object and observed state as rendered data:
39	
40	```ts
41	@Observed
42	class AppState {
43	  count: number = 0
44	}
45	
46	class AppViewModel {
47	  readonly state: AppState = new AppState()
48	
49	  increment(): void {
50	    this.state.count += 1
51	  }
52	}
53	
54	@Entry
55	@Component
56	struct Index {
57	  private vm: AppViewModel = new AppViewModel()
58	  @State private appState: AppState = this.vm.state
59	
60	  build() {
61	    Child({
62	      state: this.appState,
63	      onIncrement: () => this.vm.increment()
64	    })
65	  }
66	}
67	
68	@Component
69	struct Child {
70	  @ObjectLink state: AppState
71	  onIncrement: () => void = () => {}
72	
73	  build() {
74	    Button(`${this.state.count}`)
75	      .onClick(() => this.onIncrement())
76	  }
77	}
78	```
79	
80	## If Keeping `@ObjectLink vm`
81	
82	Only use when the VM class itself is intentionally an observed state object:
83	
84	```ts
85	@Observed
86	class AppViewModel {
87	  currentStreak: number = 0
88	}
89	
90	@Component
91	struct HomePage {
92	  @ObjectLink vm: AppViewModel
93	}
94	```
95	
96	Do not use `$vm` with `@ObjectLink`; pass object reference:
97	
98	```ts
99	HomePage({ vm: this.vm })
100	```
101	
102	Use `$name` for `@Link` bindings, not for `@ObjectLink`.
103	
104	## Warning Severity
105	
106	Treat `arkts-no-definite-assignment` as high-risk when:
107	
108	- prop name is `vm`, `viewModel`, `state`, `navStack`, or route params
109	- component reads mutable fields in `build()`
110	- button click mutates the same object
111	- runtime state propagation is required
112	
113	It may be acceptable only for non-reactive injected services after confirming no rendered field depends on internal mutation.
114

1	# Verification Loop
2	
3	## Parse CheckArktsFiles Correctly
4	
5	`CheckArktsFiles` may return:
6	
7	```json
8	{ "ok": true, "diagnostics": [...] }
9	```
10	
11	Still count diagnostics by severity. Treat any `severityStr: "Error"` as failed.
12	
13	Suggested summary:
14	
15	```text
16	CheckArktsFiles: 29 errors, 37 warnings.
17	Root causes: FontWeight enum, GridItem attribute, noNonUISyntax, object literal types.
18	```
19	
20	## Repair Order
21	
22	1. Entry/profile/build registration: `main_pages.json`, `@Entry`, `module.json5`.
23	2. Syntax/type blockers: imports, missing modules, object literal types, private access, missing methods.
24	3. ArkUI DSL/API blockers: invalid enum, invalid attribute, noNonUISyntax, typed `ForEach`.
25	4. State ownership warnings that can affect runtime: `vm!`, `@ObjectLink`, `@Link`.
26	5. Non-runtime style warnings: color consistency, deprecated API, unused imports.
27	
28	Fix all occurrences of a root cause before rerunning.
29	
30	## Build Tool Discovery
31	
32	Before reporting hvigor unavailable, check:
33	
34	```bash
35	pwd
36	ls hvigorfile.ts entry/hvigorfile.ts
37	test -x /Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/Contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw
38	test -x /Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw
39	/Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/Contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw tasks --no-daemon
40	```
41	
42	Then run from project root:
43	
44	```bash
45	/Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/Contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw assembleApp --no-daemon
46	```
47	
48	If a build connector exists and the project uses it successfully, it is acceptable:
49	
50	```text
51	build_project clean=false build_mode=debug
52	```
53	
54	## When To Rerun What
55	
56	Run `CheckArktsFiles` after editing `.ets`.
57	
58	Run real build after:
59	
60	- static errors are zero
61	- changing registered pages/resources/profile/module
62	- adding rawfile SVG/resources
63	- changing imports that may only fail in full CompileArkTS
64	- user asks for build pass
65	
66	Run runtime smoke after build when the bug involves state propagation, tab navigation, persistence, dialogs, or visible IDs. Build success does not prove UI refresh.
67	
68	## Reporting
69	
70	Final report must distinguish:
71	
72	- fixed errors
73	- build result and exact command/tool
74	- remaining warnings
75	- warnings intentionally deferred
76	- runtime risks not covered by build
77	
78	Do not call `arkts-no-definite-assignment` "standard pattern" for mutable rendered view-model inputs.
79

file.content:
# Verification Loop

## Parse CheckArktsFiles Correctly

`CheckArktsFiles` may return:

```json
{ "ok": true, "diagnostics": [...] }
```

Still count diagnostics by severity. Treat any `severityStr: "Error"` as failed.

Suggested summary:

```text
CheckArktsFiles: 29 errors, 37 warnings.
Root causes: FontWeight enum, GridItem attribute, noNonUISyntax, object literal types.
```

## Repair Order

1. Entry/profile/build registration: `main_pages.json`, `@Entry`, `module.json5`.
2. Syntax/type blockers: imports, missing modules, object literal types, private access, missing methods.
3. ArkUI DSL/API blockers: invalid enum, invalid attribute, noNonUISyntax, typed `ForEach`.
4. State ownership warnings that can affect runtime: `vm!`, `@ObjectLink`, `@Link`.
5. Non-runtime style warnings: color consistency, deprecated API, unused imports.

Fix all occurrences of a root cause before rerunning.

## Build Tool Discovery

Before reporting hvigor unavailable, check:

```bash
pwd
ls hvigorfile.ts entry/hvigorfile.ts
test -x /Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/Contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw
test -x /Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw
/Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/Contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw tasks --no-daemon
```

Then run from project root:

```bash
/Applications/DevEco-Studio.app/Contents/tools/hvigor/bin/hvigorw assembleApp --no-daemon
```

If a build connector exists and the project uses it successfully, it is acceptable:

```text
build_project clean=false build_mode=debug
```

## When To Rerun What

Run `CheckArktsFiles` after editing `.ets`.

Run real build after:

- static errors are zero
- changing registered pages/resources/profile/module
- adding rawfile SVG/resources
- changing imports that may only fail in full CompileArkTS
- user asks for build pass

Run runtime smoke after build when the bug involves state propagation, tab navigation, persistence, dialogs, or visible IDs. Build success does not prove UI refresh.

## Reporting

Final report must distinguish:

- fixed errors
- build result and exact command/tool
- remaining warnings
- warnings intentionally deferred
- runtime risks not covered by build

Do not call `arkts-no-definite-assignment` "standard pattern" for mutable rendered view-model inputs.

lastPrompt: /ArkPilot:autopilot-html-tmux-team-build-id ## UITREE DAG IMPLEMENTATION Original task: 为这个 HarmonyOS 工程实现一个“宠迹·PawLog”App。功能：多宠档案、一键记录饮食/排泄/体重/用药、健康趋势图表、疫苗驱虫提醒、就医病历归档、家庭成员共享。视觉：薄荷绿+肉垫粉，圆润治愈风，并完成构建和运行…

content.content:
1	import {
2	  CareTab,
3	  DietPayload,
4	  FamilyInfo,
5	  FamilyMember,
6	  MedicalCase,
7	  MedicalListItem,
8	  MedsPayload,
9	  Pet,
10	  Record,
11	  RecordItem,
12	  RecordsFilter,
13	  RecordType,
14	  Reminder,
15	  ReminderCategory,
16	  ReminderDialogMode,
17	  ReminderItem,
18	  SheetSurface,
19	  StoolPayload,
20	  TodaySummaryItem,
21	  TrendChart,
22	  TrendDataset,
23	  TrendPoint,
24	  TrendStat,
25	  TrendsMetric,
26	  TrendsPeriod,
27	  WeightPayload
28	} from '../models/AppTypes';
29	import { AppServices } from '../services/AppServices';
30	
31	export class AppViewModel {
32	  private services: AppServices
33	
34	  // observable surface state will be mirrored by Index.ets
35	  activeTab: string = 'tab-home'
36	  surface: string = 'home'
37	  sheet: SheetSurface = SheetSurface.None
38	  reminderDialogMode: ReminderDialogMode = ReminderDialogMode.None
39	  editingReminderId: string = ''
40	
41	  // current pet
42	  currentPet: Pet | null = null
43	  pets: Pet[] = []
44	
45	  // home
46	  todaySummary: TodaySummaryItem[] = []
47	  upcomingReminders: ReminderItem[] = []
48	
49	  // records
50	  recordsFilter: RecordsFilter = RecordsFilter.All
51	  recordsList: RecordItem[] = []
52	
53	  // trends
54	  trendsMetric: TrendsMetric = TrendsMetric.Weight
55	  trendsPeriod: TrendsPeriod = TrendsPeriod.Week
56	  trendChart: TrendChart = new TrendChart()
57	  trendStats: TrendStat[] = []
58	
59	  // care
60	  careTab: CareTab = CareTab.Reminders
61	  reminders: ReminderItem[] = []
62	  medicalCases: MedicalListItem[] = []
63	
64	  // profile
65	  familyInfo: FamilyInfo = new FamilyInfo()
66	
67	  constructor(services: AppServices) {
68	    this.services = services
69	  }
70	
71	  async load(): Promise<void> {
72	    await this.services.init()
73	    this.pets = this.services.petRepository.list()
74	    this.currentPet = this.services.petRepository.getCurrent()
75	    this.familyInfo = this.services.familyRepository.getInfo()
76	    this.refreshCurrentPetData()
77	  }
78	
79	  setSurface(surface: string): void {
80	    this.surface = surface
81	  }
82	
83	  setTab(tab: string): void {
84	    this.activeTab = tab
85	  }
86	
87	  openSheet(sheet: SheetSurface): void {
88	    this.sheet = sheet
89	  }
90	
91	  closeSheet(): void {
92	    this.sheet = SheetSurface.None
93	  }
94	
95	  async selectPet(id: string): Promise<void> {
96	    await this.services.petRepository.setCurrent(id)
97	    this.currentPet = this.services.petRepository.getCurrent()
98	    this.refreshCurrentPetData()
99	  }
100	
101	  async savePet(pet: Pet): Promise<void> {
102	    await this.services.petRepository.save(pet)
103	    this.pets = this.services.petRepository.list()
104	    this.currentPet = this.services.petRepository.getCurrent()
105	    this.refreshCurrentPetData()
106	  }
107	
108	  async deletePet(id: string): Promise<void> {
109	    await this.services.petRepository.delete(id)
110	    this.pets = this.services.petRepository.list()
111	    this.currentPet = this.services.petRepository.getCurrent()
112	    this.refreshCurrentPetData()
113	  }
114	
115	  setRecordsFilter(filter: RecordsFilter): void {
116	    this.recordsFilter = filter
117	    this.refreshRecords()
118	  }
119	
120	  async saveRecord(record: Record): Promise<void> {
121	    await this.services.recordRepository.save(record)
122	    this.refreshCurrentPetData()
123	  }
124	
125	  async deleteRecord(id: string): Promise<void> {
126	    await this.services.recordRepository.delete(id)
127	    this.refreshCurrentPetData()
128	  }
129	
130	  setTrendsMetric(metric: TrendsMetric): void {
131	    this.trendsMetric = metric
132	    this.refreshTrends()
133	  }
134	
135	  setTrendsPeriod(period: TrendsPeriod): void {
136	    this.trendsPeriod = period
137	    this.refreshTrends()
138	  }
139	
140	  setCareTab(tab: CareTab): void {
141	    this.careTab = tab
142	  }
143	
144	  async saveReminder(reminder: Reminder): Promise<void> {
145	    await this.services.reminderRepository.save(reminder)
146	    this.refreshCare()
147	    this.refreshHomeReminders()
148	  }
149	
150	  async markReminderDone(id: string): Promise<void> {
151	    await this.services.reminderRepository.markDone(id)
152	    this.refreshCare()
153	    this.refreshHomeReminders()
154	  }
155	
156	  async deleteReminder(id: string): Promise<void> {
157	    await this.services.reminderRepository.delete(id)
158	    this.refreshCare()
159	    this.refreshHomeReminders()
160	  }
161	
162	  openReminderEditor(mode: ReminderDialogMode, id: string = ''): void {
163	    this.reminderDialogMode = mode
164	    this.editingReminderId = id
165	  }
166	
167	  closeReminderEditor(): void {
168	    this.reminderDialogMode = ReminderDialogMode.None
169	    this.editingReminderId = ''
170	  }
171	
172	  async saveMedicalCase(c: MedicalCase): Promise<void> {
173	    await this.services.medicalRepository.save(c)
174	    this.refreshCare()
175	  }
176	
177	  async deleteMedicalCase(id: string): Promise<void> {
178	    await this.services.medicalRepository.delete(id)
179	    this.refreshCare()
180	  }
181	
182	  private refreshCurrentPetData(): void {
183	    this.refreshHome()
184	    this.refreshRecords()
185	    this.refreshTrends()
186	    this.refreshCare()
187	  }
188	
189	  private refreshHome(): void {
190	    if (!this.currentPet) {
191	      this.todaySummary = []
192	      this.upcomingReminders = []
193	      return
194	    }
195	    this.todaySummary = this.services.recordRepository.todaySummary(this.currentPet.id)
196	    this.upcomingReminders = this.services.reminderRepository.upcomingByPet(this.currentPet.id, 5)
197	  }
198	
199	  private refreshRecords(): void {
200	    if (!this.currentPet) {
201	      this.recordsList = []
202	      return
203	    }
204	    this.recordsList = this.services.recordRepository.listItemsByPet(this.currentPet.id, this.recordsFilter)
205	  }
206	
207	  private refreshTrends(): void {
208	    if (!this.currentPet) {
209	      this.trendChart = new TrendChart()
210	      this.trendStats = []
211	      return
212	    }
213	    let now: number = Date.now()
214	    let days: number = this.trendsPeriod === TrendsPeriod.Week ? 7 : 30
215	    let points: TrendPoint[] = []
216	    for (let i = days - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
217	      let d: Date = new Date(now - i * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
218	      points.push({ date: d.getTime(), value: 0 })
219	    }
220	
221	    if (this.trendsMetric === TrendsMetric.Weight) {
222	      let records: Record[] = this.services.recordRepository.listByPet(this.currentPet.id, RecordsFilter.Weight)
223	      let latest: number = this.currentPet.weight
224	      for (let p of points) {
225	        let dayStart: number = this.startOfDay(p.date)
226	        let dayEnd: number = dayStart + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
227	        let dayRecords: Record[] = records.filter((r: Record) => r.time >= dayStart && r.time < dayEnd)
228	        if (dayRecords.length > 0) {
229	          latest = (dayRecords[0].payload as WeightPayload).value
230	        }
231	        p.value = latest
232	      }
233	      let chart: TrendChart = new TrendChart()
234	      chart.labels = points.map((p: TrendPoint) => this.formatDay(p.date))
235	      let ds: TrendDataset = new TrendDataset()
236	      ds.label = '体重'
237	      ds.color = '#7FD5C0'
238	      ds.points = points
239	      chart.datasets = [ds]
240	      this.trendChart = chart
241	
242	      this.trendStats = [
243	        this.makeStat('latest-weight', '当前体重', String(latest), 'kg', '0'),
244	        this.makeStat('pet-weight', '档案体重', String(this.currentPet.weight), 'kg', '0')
245	      ]
246	    } else if (this.trendsMetric === TrendsMetric.Diet) {
247	      let records: Record[] = this.services.recordRepository.listByPet(this.currentPet.id, RecordsFilter.Diet)
248	      for (let p of points) {
249	        let dayStart: number = this.startOfDay(p.date)
250	        let dayEnd: number = dayStart + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
251	        let total: number = records
252	          .filter((r: Record) => r.time >= dayStart && r.time < dayEnd)
253	          .reduce((sum: number, r: Record) => sum + (r.payload as DietPayload).amount, 0)
254	        p.value = total
255	      }
256	      let chart: TrendChart = new TrendChart()
257	      chart.labels = points.map((p: TrendPoint) => this.formatDay(p.date))
258	      let ds: TrendDataset = new TrendDataset()
259	      ds.label = '饮食'
260	      ds.color = '#FFB7B2'
261	      ds.points = points
262	      chart.datasets = [ds]
263	      this.trendChart = chart
264	
265	      let weekTotal: number = points.reduce((sum: number, p: TrendPoint) => sum + p.value, 0)
266	      this.trendStats = [
267	        this.makeStat('avg-diet', '日均饮食', String(Math.round(weekTotal / days)), 'g', '0'),
268	        this.makeStat('total-diet', '累计饮食', String(weekTotal), 'g', '0')
269	      ]
270	    } else if (this.trendsMetric === TrendsMetric.Stool) {
271	      let records: Record[] = this.services.recordRepository.listByPet(this.currentPet.id, RecordsFilter.Stool)
272	      for (let p of points) {
273	        let dayStart: number = this.startOfDay(p.date)
274	        let dayEnd: number = dayStart + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
275	        let count: number = records.filter((r: Record) => r.time >= dayStart && r.time < dayEnd).length
276	        p.value = count
277	      }
278	      let chart: TrendChart = new TrendChart()
279	      chart.labels = points.map((p: TrendPoint) => this.formatDay(p.date))
280	      let ds: TrendDataset = new TrendDataset()
281	      ds.label = '排泄'
282	      ds.color = '#FFDAC1'
283	      ds.points = points
284	      chart.datasets = [ds]
285	      this.trendChart = chart
286	
287	      let total: number = points.reduce((sum: number, p: TrendPoint) => sum + p.value, 0)
288	      this.trendStats = [
289	        this.makeStat('avg-stool', '日均排泄', String(Math.round(total / days)), '次', '0'),
290	        this.makeStat('total-stool', '累计排泄', String(total), '次', '0')
291	      ]
292	    }
293	  }
294	
295	  private refreshCare(): void {
296	    if (!this.currentPet) {
297	      this.reminders = []
298	      return
299	    }
300	    this.reminders = this.services.reminderRepository.listByPet(this.currentPet.id)
301	  }
302	
303	  private refreshHomeReminders(): void {
304	    if (!this.currentPet) {
305	      this.upcomingReminders = []
306	      return
307	    }
308	    this.upcomingReminders = this.services.reminderRepository.upcomingByPet(this.currentPet.id, 5)
309	  }
310	
311	  private makeStat(key: string, label: string, value: string, unit: string, change: string): TrendStat {
312	    let s: TrendStat = new TrendStat()
313	    s.key = key
314	    s.label = label
315	    s.value = value
316	    s.unit = unit
317	    s.change = change
318	    return s
319	  }
320	
321	  private startOfDay(ts: number): number {
322	    let d: Date = new Date(ts)
323	    d.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)
324	    return d.getTime()
325	  }
326	
327	  private formatDay(ts: number): string {
328	    let d: Date = new Date(ts)
329	    return `${d.getMonth() + 1}/${d.getDate()}`
330	  }
331	}
332

content.subject: Create ui-behavior.json behavior contract

content.subject: Implement headless logic layer

content.subject: Visual integration and final build
content.description: Once design artifacts are available, implement final ArkTS pages/components, bind semantic IDs, apply theme/icons, and run the final build.
content.activeForm: Integrating visual layer and running final build

lastPrompt: /ArkPilot:autopilot-html-tmux-team-build-id ## UITREE DAG IMPLEMENTATION Original task: 为这个 HarmonyOS 工程实现一个“宠迹·PawLog”App。功能：多宠档案、一键记录饮食/排泄/体重/用药、健康趋势图表、疫苗驱虫提醒、就医病历归档、家庭成员共享。视觉：薄荷绿+肉垫粉，圆润治愈风，并完成构建和运行…

content.text:
```text
PawLog Implementation Handoff Summary

Behavior contract:
- Created .arkpilot/designs/ui-behavior.json with data model, services, state machine, interaction flows, and semantic test targets.

Headless logic layer:
- models/AppTypes.ets: Pet, Record, Reminder, MedicalCase, FamilyMember, payloads, trend types, route params.
- services/AppStore.ets: JSON preferences wrapper.
- services/PetRepository.ets, RecordRepository.ets, ReminderRepository.ets, MedicalRepository.ets: CRUD + persistence.
- services/PhotoService.ets: PhotoViewPicker + sandbox copy.
- services/FamilyRepository.ets: simulated invite code and member list.
- services/AppServices.ets: dependency graph singleton.
- common/PageContext.ets, Routes.ets: lightweight router wrapper.
- viewmodels/AppViewModel.ets: state and transitions for all flows.

Visual integration:
- Updated common/Theme.ets with mint + paw-pink palette and brand gradients.
- Updated common/TabTypes.ets for 5 PawLog tabs.
- Rewrote common/SvgIcon.ets with drawn Shape-based icons.
- Updated components/BottomTabBar.ets labels and icons.
- Created pages/Index.ets shell with fixed bottom-tab and surface replacement.
- Created stub pages: HomePage, RecordsPage, TrendsPage, CarePage, ProfilePage, PetEditorPage, MedicalCaseEditorPage, ReminderDetailPage, MedicalCasePage.

Verification:
- CheckArktsFiles passed for all edited logic and page files (only information/warning-level diagnostics remain: deprecated getContext and color-consistency warnings).
- Real build passed: BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 3.65s using DevEco hvigorw with bundled JDK.

Known remaining work:
- Pages are stubs; final visual implementation from page-home-page.html and DESIGN*.md should replace them.
- Sheet overlays are placeholders; add-record, record-* forms, pet-picker, and family-invite sheets need real UI and semantic IDs.
- Reminder editor currently opens as a mode in AppViewModel but has no UI dialog/page.
- Signing config is not configured, so SignHap/SignApp were skipped; this is normal for an unsigned debug build.
```
